summary: Tested Online Delivery Platforms feature for SSC Track ERP. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend Platforms page and Sales page Online Platform payment option working correctly. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in POST /api/platforms and POST /api/platform-payments endpoints.
seed_data_creation: 10 default platforms seeded: HungerStation (20%), Hunger (18%), Jahez (20%), ToYou (18%), Keta (15%), Ninja (15%), Careem Food (22%), Talabat (20%), Marsool (15%), Other (0%)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Online Delivery Platforms feature fully implemented. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/platforms, GET /api/platforms/summary, POST /api/platforms/seed-defaults, GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/platform-payments, GET /api/platforms/{id}/reconciliation. Frontend: PlatformsPage.jsx at /platforms with 3 tabs (Overview, Platforms, Payments). SalesPage.jsx has 'Online Platform' payment mode option that shows platform selector dropdown when selected.

platforms_api.details: All CRUD operations working. GET /api/platforms returns list with calculated totals. POST creates new platform. PUT updates. DELETE removes or soft-deletes if sales exist.

platform_payments_api.details: POST /api/platform-payments records payment with platform validation. Returns 400 for missing platform_id, 404 for invalid platform.

platforms_summary_api.details: GET /api/platforms/summary returns platform summaries with totals (total_sales, total_received, total_commission, total_pending).

seed_defaults_api.details: POST /api/platforms/seed-defaults is idempotent - creates 10 default platforms on first call, skips existing on subsequent calls.

platforms_page_ui.details: PlatformsPage loads at /platforms with Overview, Platforms, Payments tabs. Shows platform cards, summary stats, Add Platform button, Record Payment button.

sales_online_platform.details: SalesPage shows 'Online Platform' payment option in Mode dropdown. When selected with amount, 'Select Delivery Platform' dropdown appears with all configured platforms.

mongodb_objectid_serialization.issue: POST /api/platforms and POST /api/platform-payments returned 500 error due to MongoDB ObjectId not being JSON serializable
mongodb_objectid_serialization.fix: Added platform.pop('_id', None) and payment.pop('_id', None) after insert_one() calls before returning response
